title: Project: Cure
description: The Modpack for the "Project: Cure" Escape-Room-Map
body:
This is the official Modpack used by the "Project: Cure" Adventure Map by CKingCrafter, Mattu_11 and TheLokiCrafter.

Please note that the official map is scripted and coded in German.

We built an Escape Room Adventure Map with a few mods to upgrade the vanilla escape experience. 
## This Modpack adds:
### a few gameplay-changing Mods for the Escape-Room-Map like:
- EasyNPC
### Some decoration Mods for the Design aspect:
- Chipped
- Macaw's Collection
- Supplementaries
### And a few technical Mods like:
- Redstone Pen
- Integrated Circuit

*Modpack-Icon from the De-Extinction Mod
